indicators.name: absence of cooking appliances
indicators.rationale: No stove, oven, or microwave is visible, making it impossible to perform cooking tasks.

indicators.name: absence of water fixture
indicators.rationale: No sink is present, which is essential for food preparation and kitchen hygiene.

indicators.name: hard flooring
indicators.rationale: Hard flooring is not suitable for food preparation, as it can be difficult to clean and maintain.

indicators.name: columns obstructing view
indicators.rationale: Columns obstruct the view and limit the available space for cooking activities.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for daily cooking activities. There are no cooking appliances, no sink, and the hard flooring makes it difficult to prepare food. The presence of columns further limits the available space and obstructs the view, making it impractical for cooking.
